# [PKT-MIG-001](task-0151): Migration Fixtures and Examples

## Purpose

Create migration fixtures and examples.

## Scope

- Fixture format
- Example migration
- Validation

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Create examples
3. Add validation

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Examples complete
3. Validated
